final:
module top_module(
    input clock,
    input [63:0] data,
    input [63:0] key,
    output reg match
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt)
begin
    if (data == key)
        match <= 1;
    else
        match <= 0;
end

endmodule
